subject: quiz
hookText: Only sharp eyes catch this one.

pinterest.text: Most 6-year-olds take 4 tries to solve this maze. Eyes scan, pencil moves, and spatial reasoning becomes automatic. Save this for Saturday morning. More puzzles like this in JoyMaze — free on iOS & Android.

instagram.text:
"Hand this to your kid. See what happens. 
Eyes narrow. Pencil slows. 
That frustration before the breakthrough — that's the skill. 
How fast did yours solve it? Drop the time below.
More like this in JoyMaze — link in bio."

youtube.text:
Watch what happens when a 6-year-old gets handed a maze with no instructions. They scan, they backtrack, they try again - that's spatial reasoning and they don't know it. For parents who choose activities with intention, more printable puzzles at joymaze.com.
